structured_payload_candidate.title: Alarm Threshold Determination Based on Transducer Accuracy
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit (airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The constant value thresholds (10% of maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm) in airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms should be set to the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Designers should determine threshold values based on sensor accuracy.
configurable_values: Constant value thresholds (default 10% of max or 50 cfm)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow. The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.

evidence_quote: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow. The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.
evidence_text: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow. The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.
judge_reason: Guidance on setting alarm thresholds based on transducer accuracy.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 3 reset requests if zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 min after suppression; send 2 requests if exceeds by 2°C (3°F); send 1 request if Cooling Loop >95% until it drops below 85%; send 0 requests if Cooling Loop <95%.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature deviation or Cooling Loop output high.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate integer requests as per cascading conditions.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote:
a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
evidence_text:
a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
judge_reason: Explicit cooling SAT reset request rules.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cold-Duct Static Pressure Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 3 requests if measured airflow <50% of setpoint and damper >95% for 1 min; send 2 requests if <70% and damper >95% for 1 min; send 1 request if damper >95% until <85%; send 0 if damper <95%.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Airflow less than setpoint plus high damper position.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%.
d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote:
a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%.
d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
evidence_text:
a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%.
d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
judge_reason: Explicit cold-duct static pressure reset request rules.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Backflow Prevention Override
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the heating air handler is not proven ON, close the heating damper regardless of other control logic. If the cooling air handler is not proven ON, close the cooling damper.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating or cooling air handler not proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Override damper to closed to prevent backflow.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.
b. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote:
a. If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.
b. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.
evidence_text:
a. If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.
b. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Fault
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan off and airflow sensor reading above the larger of 10% of maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading indicates airflow when fan is off, exceeding threshold for 30 min.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
judge_reason: Explicit airflow sensor calibration fault rule.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Fault
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position = 0% and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position 0%, airflow above threshold for 10 min with fan proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow detected when damper commanded closed, indicating leaking damper.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 3 requests if zone temperature below heating setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 min after suppression; send 2 requests if below by 2°C (3°F); send 1 request if Heating Loop >95% until <85%; send 0 if <95%.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature deviation or Heating Loop output high.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If the zone temperature is below the zone’s heating setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature is below the zone’s heating setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Heating Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Heating Loop is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Heating Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote:
a. If the zone temperature is below the zone’s heating setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature is below the zone’s heating setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Heating Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Heating Loop is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Heating Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
evidence_text:
a. If the zone temperature is below the zone’s heating setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature is below the zone’s heating setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Heating Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Heating Loop is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Heating Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
judge_reason: Explicit heating SAT reset request rules.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband State Temperature and Damper Control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint is set to the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint; hot duct damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Operate cold duct at minimum airflow; close hot duct damper.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.
evidence_text: b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.
judge_reason: Explicit deadband control rule from guideline.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarms
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 4 alarm if measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 min while setpoint > 0. Also alarm if < 50% for 10 min. Suppress these alarms if zone has Importance-Multiplier of 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow less than 70% (or 50%) of setpoint for 10 minutes with setpoint > 0.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm; suppress if Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Low airflow condition as described; suppression when Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote:
a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
evidence_text:
a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Active Airflow Setpoint Endpoints by Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The active cooling maximum, minimum, and heating maximum airflow setpoints are determined by the Zone Group mode: Occupied (Vcool-max, Vmin*, Vheat-max), Cooldown (Vcool-max, 0, 0), Setup (Vcool-max, 0, 0), Warmup (0, 0, Vheat-max), Setback (0, 0, Vheat-max), Unoccupied (0, 0, 0).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Apply corresponding endpoints for active cold duct airflow setpoint and hot duct airflow setpoint control.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.14.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group the zone is a part of (see Table 5.14.4).
Table 5.14.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat -max 0 0 Vheat -max Vheat -max 0

evidence_quote:
Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.14.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group the zone is a part of (see Table 5.14.4).
Table 5.14.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat -max 0 0 Vheat -max Vheat -max 0
evidence_text:
Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.14.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group the zone is a part of (see Table 5.14.4).
Table 5.14.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat -max 0 0 Vheat -max Vheat -max 0
judge_reason: Operational endpoints table directly from guideline.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 3 requests if measured airflow <50% of setpoint while setpoint >0 for 1 min; send 2 requests if <70% for 1 min. (No further conditions specified.)

b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero for 1 minute, send 2 requests.
